definition.procedurexml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><variables><variable type="Number" id="health">health</variable></variables><block type="event_trigger" deletable="false" x="40" y="40"><field name="trigger">no_ext_trigger</field><next><block type="controls_if"><mutation else="1"></mutation><value name="IF0"><block type="math_binary_ops"><field name="OP">GTE</field><value name="A"><block type="number_variable"><field name="config">CUSTOM:MobExecutionCommomSet</field><field name="variable">limit_max_health</field></block></value><value name="B"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">0</field></block></value></block></value><statement name="DO0"><block type="variables_set_number"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" is_player_var="false" has_entity="false"></mutation><field name="VAR">local:health</field><value name="VAL"><block type="number_variable"><field name="config">CUSTOM:MobExecutionCommomSet</field><field name="variable">limit_max_health</field></block></value></block></statement><statement name="ELSE"><block type="variables_set_number"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" is_player_var="false" has_entity="false"></mutation><field name="VAR">local:health</field><value name="VAL"><block type="math_java_constants"><field name="CONSTANT">INFINITY</field></block></value></block></statement><next><block type="return_number"><value name="return"><block type="variables_get_number"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" is_player_var="false" has_entity="false"></mutation><field name="VAR">local:health</field></block></value></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
